ahp_elicited_weights.description: Weights derived from the 6-respondent expert survey (Section 3.1 of the paper). This is the empirical output of ahp_weight_elicitation.py run against the (anonymized, email-stripped) survey response data.

baseline_illustrative_weights.description: Baseline weight vector used for the worked example in Section 4.1-4.4 of the paper. Close to, but not identical to, the AHP-elicited weights; the difference is the subject of the robustness check in Section 4.5.

archetypes.description: Illustrative, hypothetical performance scores. NOT derived from disclosed data of any real manufacturer or system. See Section 4 disclaimer in the paper.

expert_panel_demographics.note: Recruited via non-probabilistic convenience sampling from the authors' professional networks. E-mail addresses collected for coordination were deleted post-collection and are not part of this dataset.
